records.raw_text: Each paragraph must include controlled sentence-length burstiness rather than a flat medium-length distribution.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Sentence-length variance must stay above the configured lower bound for the active cadence profile.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Lexical entropy per sentence must remain within corpus-relative min/max thresholds.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Clause-depth runs must be bounded; the system may not emit too many consecutive high-depth or low-depth sentences.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Every paragraph must be assigned an information-density band and must conform to that band's density constraints.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Narrative pressure must evolve within configured slope bounds and may not flatten unintentionally inside pressure-building scenes.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Register drift per sentence and per paragraph must remain inside the allowed drift window for the active voice.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Character or author idiosyncrasies must be present often enough to preserve voice, but not so often that they become caricature.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: In POV-deep scenes, free indirect discourse blend must remain within configured narrator/character mixing bounds.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Scene-to-scene residue must carry forward with controlled decay and bounded similarity.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Dialogue must exhibit non-uniform turn lengths and controlled overlap or interruption patterns.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Character disfluency rates must match trait- and tension-specific ranges.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Editing passes may not reduce entropy and idiosyncrasy below the configured preservation floor.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Style-preservation edits must restore voice markers when cleanup operations over-normalize prose.
records.description: Ruleset candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Maintain a rolling paragraph buffer for sentence lengths and trigger burst modulation when medium-length clustering persists.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.
records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Compute per-sentence lexical entropy and bias generation toward context-appropriate synonymy when entropy is too low.

records.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

records.raw_text: Parse clause depth per sentence and inject compensating low-depth or high-depth sentences when run limits are exceeded.

records.raw_text: Tag each paragraph with an information-density band and route generation constraints through that band profile.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.

records.raw_text: Update a narrative-pressure scalar through each scene and bind cadence decisions to that scalar.

records.raw_text: Score each sentence on a register axis and block abrupt register jumps beyond configured drift thresholds.
records.description: Operator candidate extracted during research ingestion.

records.raw_text: Load per-character idiosyncrasy profiles and enforce bounded reuse of signature discourse markers or phrase fossils.
